points.text: Intellia Therapeutics — Lonvoguran Ziclumeran (lonvo-z) — Hereditary Angioedema (HAE) — Phase 3 HAELO trial data to be presented at EAACI 2026; in vivo CRISPR/Cas9 therapy designed to permanently lower kallikrein by inactivating KLKB1 gene with single dose.

Beam Therapeutics — In vivo gene editing — Base editing and targeted delivery — Gopi Shanker, Ph.D., CSO, discussed the rapidly evolving landscape of precision genetic medicines in a Life Science Leader podcast episode.

Mammoth Biosciences — Proprietary ultracompact CRISPR systems — Gene editing — Lucas Harrington, Co-Founder and CSO, highlighted the development of potential medicines using compact CRISPR technology in a Cell & Gene podcast.

Scribe Therapeutics — Next-generation CRISPR and epigenetic editing tools — Cardiovascular disease (CVD) — Benjamin Oakes, CEO and Co-Founder, discussed building safer CRISPR medicines for CVD indications in a Cell & Gene podcast.

Intellia Therapeutics — Lonvoguran Ziclumeran (lonvo-z) — Hereditary Angioedema (HAE) — Phase 3 HAELO trial data to be presented at EAACI 2026; therapy utilizes Nobel Prize-winning CRISPR/Cas9 technology to permanently lower kallikrein by inactivating KLKB1 gene with a single dose.

Intellia Therapeutics — Lonvoguran Ziclumeran (lonvo-z) — Hereditary Angioedema (HAE) — Received Orphan Drug and RMAT Designation (FDA), Innovation Passport (MHRA), PRIME Designation (EMA), and Orphan Drug Designation (European Commission).

Washington University School of Medicine (WashU Medicine) — CRISPR-edited hookworms — Tetrodotoxin neutralization — Bioengineered parasites successfully secrete neutralizing antibodies into hamster bloodstream, demonstrating proof-of-concept for transgenic parasite-based drug delivery.

Washington University School of Medicine (WashU Medicine) — CRISPR-edited hookworms — Tetrodotoxin neutralization — Bioengineered hookworms successfully secrete neutralizing antibodies into hamster bloodstream, demonstrating a proof-of-concept for transgenic parasite-based drug delivery systems.

Intellia Therapeutics — Lonvoguran Ziclumeran (lonvo-z) — Hereditary Angioedema — Phase 3 HAELO global, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study data presentation scheduled for EAACI 2026 Annual Congress (June 12-15, Istanbul); therapy utilizes Nobel Prize-winning CRISPR/Cas9 technology.

Beam Therapeutics — In vivo gene editing platform — Base editing and targeted delivery — CSO Gopi Shanker detailed strategic approaches to reimagining in vivo gene editing in a June 2026 podcast interview.
Mammoth Biosciences — Ultracompact CRISPR systems — Gene editing — Lucas Harrington presented on the utility of proprietary compact CRISPR systems for drug development in a June 2026 podcast.

Scribe Therapeutics — CRISPR and epigenetic editing tools — Cardiovascular disease — Benjamin Oakes outlined the development of next-generation CRISPR tools specifically for CVD applications in a June 2026 podcast.

Intellia Therapeutics — Lonvoguran Ziclumeran (lonvo-z) — Hereditary Angioedema — Phase 3 HAELO global, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study data presentation scheduled for EAACI 2026 (June 12-15, Istanbul) as late-breaking oral presentation.

Makedonka Mitreva / WashU Medicine — CRISPR-edited hookworm platform — Chronic disease/toxin exposure — Published in Nature Communications; engineered worms produce toxin-neutralizing antibodies for continuous in vivo delivery.

Makedonka Mitreva / WashU Medicine — CRISPR-edited hookworm platform — Tetrodotoxin neutralization — Published proof-of-concept in Nature Communications showing genetically modified hookworms produce and deliver toxin-neutralizing antibodies in hamsters.

Intellia Therapeutics — CRISPR gene editing commercialization — Lonvoguran Ziclumeran (lonvo-z) — Phase 3 HAELO trial ongoing; secured Orphan Drug, RMAT (FDA), Innovation Passport (MHRA), PRIME (EMA), and Orphan Drug Designation (EC) regulatory statuses.

Beam Therapeutics — In vivo gene editing commercialization — Base editing and targeted delivery programs — CSO Gopi Shanker discussed the company's strategic focus on precision genetic medicines in a June 2026 podcast.

Mammoth Biosciences — Compact CRISPR system development — Proprietary ultracompact CRISPR platforms — Lucas Harrington highlighted the company's unique approach to gene editing in a June 2026 podcast.
Scribe Therapeutics — Next-generation CRISPR tool creation — Epigenetic editing and CRISPR for CVD — Benjamin Oakes detailed the company's pipeline and safety focus in a June 2026 podcast.

Intellia Therapeutics — CRISPR gene editing commercialization — Lonvoguran Ziclumeran (lonvo-z) — Advancing Phase 3 HAELO trial for HAE; candidate designed as first one-time treatment via in vivo KLKB1 gene inactivation.

Lonvoguran Ziclumeran (lonvo-z) — Mechanism: In vivo CRISPR/Cas9 gene editing inactivating KLKB1 gene to permanently lower kallikrein — Phase: 3 (HAELO) — Population: Patients with Hereditary Angioedema — Comparator: Placebo — Status: Late-breaking oral presentation of primary data scheduled for EAACI 2026.

Beam Therapeutics programs — Mechanism: Base editing and targeted delivery — Phase: Preclinical/Clinical (contextual) — Population: In vivo gene editing targets — Endpoints: Reimagining precision genetic medicine delivery strategies discussed by CSO Gopi Shanker.

Mammoth Biosciences programs — Mechanism: Ultracompact CRISPR systems — Phase: Preclinical/Clinical (contextual) — Population: Gene editing targets — Endpoints: Development of potential medicines using compact CRISPR technology discussed by Lucas Harrington.

Scribe Therapeutics programs — Mechanism: Next-generation CRISPR and epigenetic editing — Phase: Preclinical/Clinical (contextual) — Population: Cardiovascular disease patients — Endpoints: Building safer CRISPR medicines for CVD discussed by Benjamin Oakes.

Lonvoguran Ziclumeran (lonvo-z) — Mechanism: In vivo CRISPR/Cas9 gene editing to inactivate KLKB1 gene — Phase: 3 (HAELO) — Population: Patients with Hereditary Angioedema — Comparator: Placebo — Goal: Permanent kallikrein reduction with single dose.

CRISPR-edited hookworms — Mechanism: Genetic modification to secrete therapeutic antibodies — Phase: Preclinical (Hamster model) — Population: Hamsters — Comparator: None stated — Results: Successful secretion of tetrodotoxin-neutralizing antibodies into host bloodstream.

CRISPR-edited hookworms — Mechanism: Genetic modification to secrete therapeutic antibodies — Phase: Preclinical (Hamster model) — Population: Hamsters exposed to tetrodotoxin — Comparator: Not specified — Results: Successful secretion of neutralizing antibodies into host bloodstream; platform enables continuous delivery of therapeutics.
Intellia Therapeutics — Inducement grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) — CRISPR pipeline advancement — Announced equity grants to attract key talent while advancing lonvo-z Phase 3 program.
